title: Helios Form
description: A luminous orbital-vehicle showroom for inspecting six futuristic craft and their onboard systems.

prompt.objective: Build a luminous systems showroom for selecting and inspecting six futuristic orbital vehicles.

mintAssets.brief: Six aircraft-style orbital vehicles with distinct roles and silhouettes in one cohesive asset pack.
A restrained aerospace ambience bed and one precise selection sound.

experience: Orbit the selected craft in a bright inspection bay.
Sync a six-item selector, specifications, lighting, camera, and audio.
prompt.visualDirection: White-and-ice-blue aerospace editorial UI with technical linework and soft reflections.

thumbnail.alt: Asterion interceptor displayed in the Helios Form orbital showroom

social.title: Helios Form
social.description: Inspect six futuristic orbital vehicles in a responsive, sound-rich systems showroom.
